critic_coordination-00001.content: Assign each artifact-pair to exactly one critic for cross-checking
critic_coordination-00001.justification: 5 of 18 critics independently found developer-views-status gap — exclusive ownership eliminates convergent duplication
critic_coordination-00001.evidence: Implementation, Logic, Validation, Capability Accuracy, Verification all reported same missing-component gap

critic_coordination-00002.content: Prioritize code-grounded critics over spec-only critics for unique findings
critic_coordination-00002.justification: Applied: accuracy critics already configured with Read/Glob/Grep tools in critic configs. Code-grounded critics (Decision Plausibility, Requirement Accuracy, Architecture Accuracy) produce highest-value unique findings.
critic_coordination-00002.evidence: Decision Plausibility verified 8/8 decisions with file:line refs; Requirement Accuracy found exit-code mismatch at bin/agentcontainer:230-244 | Resolution: confirmed in critic config tool assignments across all schemas

critic_coordination-00003.content: Behavioral edge cases at capability boundaries cause highest duplication
critic_coordination-00003.justification: --rebuild silent-ignore found by 4 critics independently; edge cases sit at intersection of requirements, validation, coverage, and accuracy scopes
critic_coordination-00003.evidence: Requirements Coverage functional-critic-1, Validation REQUIREMENTS-1, Requirement Accuracy STEP-MISMATCH-2, Requirements TESTABILITY-1 all flagged --rebuild precondition gap

critic_output-00004.content: Set per-critic token budgets to prevent truncation of tail findings
critic_output-00004.justification: Invalid premise: truncation was caused by account budget limit, not per-critic token limits. Token budget mechanism (--max-tokens) does not exist in claude -p CLI.
critic_output-00004.evidence: Dependency TECHNICAL-2, Technical TECHNICAL-3, Requirements TESTABILITY-3, Verification INFRA-4, Architecture Accuracy TECH-2, Requirement Accuracy MISSING-SCENARIO-1 all end mid-sentence | Correction: mid-sentence truncation caused by account spending limit, not addressable per-critic

critic_coverage-00005.content: Add dedicated error-UX critic for user-facing failure paths and exit codes
critic_coverage-00005.justification: Applied: Error UX critic added to all 4 schemas in commit 67ee304. Critic audits error messages, exit codes, and user-facing failure paths.
critic_coverage-00005.evidence: Requirement Accuracy found exit-code 0-vs-1 mismatch incidentally; no critic owned systematic error path audit | Resolution: error-ux critic config added to critics.{schema}.json across all schemas (commit 67ee304)

critic_coordination-00006.content: Consolidate testability checking into one critic, not split across two
critic_coordination-00006.justification: Applied: testability bullet removed from Integration eval-criteria-1 across all 4 schemas (commit 67ee304). Requirements critic now owns testability checking exclusively.
critic_coordination-00006.evidence: Requirements TESTABILITY-1 flags cmd_build(); Integration TESTABILITY-1 flags load_config(), image_exists(), find_project_container() — same pattern, two critics | Resolution: Integration skillbook updated, testability criteria removed with ACE metadata tracing to this guidance

critic_coverage-00007.content: Positive decision verification is uniquely valuable — keep Decision Plausibility critic
critic_coverage-00007.justification: Applied: Decision Plausibility critic confirmed as permanent fixture across all schemas. No action needed — guidance validated existing design.
critic_coverage-00007.evidence: Decision Plausibility table: 8/8 decisions supported with code locations (build.sh:153, up.sh:80-83, config.sh:13-21) | Resolution: confirmed, critic retained in all schema configs
